summary: Attempted to split tender into read-only query and execution surfaces, but runtime verification failed because the project_read sample still resolved to tender create/write rights and still hit the clickable statusbar branch, indicating unresolved implied-group or effective-role leakage.

notes: This high-risk batch exposed unresolved effective permission leakage on the tender surface.
The intended read-only query split did not hold at runtime for the project_read sample.
Further automatic ACL changes are unsafe until the implied-group or role-overlay source is audited explicitly.

next_step: Stop immediately and open a narrower high-risk audit batch focused only on tender effective group inheritance and view-branch selection before any further ACL changes.
